# ArtOnBar.com — llms.txt
# AI-readable site index for GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)

## Site
Name: ArtOnBar
URL: https://www.artonbar.com
Description: The Algarve's curated bar guide. Written by a local. Covers cocktail bars, rooftop bars, speakeasies, wine bars and beach bars across the Algarve, Portugal.
Author: ArtOnBar (local Algarve resident)
Updated: 2026-05-11

## What this site covers
- Bar reviews for Lagos, Albufeira, Faro, Tavira, Carvoeiro, Portimão
- Vibe-based guides: sunset bars, rooftop bars, speakeasies, wine bars, beach bars, late-night, dog-friendly, winter-open
- Individual bar reviews with address, hours, price tier, signature drinks, honest verdict
- All reviews personally verified by someone who lives in the Algarve

## Top recommendations by town (2026)
- Lagos best cocktail bar: Forbidden Door, R. Primeiro de Maio 6 (speakeasy, €€€, daily 7pm-1am, 4.7/5)
- Albufeira best bar: Sal Rosa, Praça Miguel Bombarda 2 (cliff terrace, €€€, Wed-Mon 4pm-11:30pm, 4.5/5)
- Faro best bar: LAB Terrace, R. Cmde. Francisco Manuel (sunset rooftop, €€, daily 3pm-8pm, 4.7/5)

## Editorial policy
- All bars visited in person before listing
- Sponsored/featured listings clearly marked on each page
- No comp drinks accepted
- Reviews not altered by payment

- Homepage: https://www.artonbar.com/
